_comment: Hand-curated, like carry-bis.json — augment picks that change what 'correct play' means for another checker. Each bucket is a separate condition type; add entries as false positives are found in real reports. An empty bucket is fine — it just means no known augment changes that rule path yet.

TFT_Augment_TragicalBlade.reason: Deadlier Blades stacks bonus AD on the holder for every takedown, so Deathblade keeps scaling through the game well past its base stats — it's a legitimate carry item under this augment, not an off-BiS pick
